name: Financial Processing Staff
description: Staff handling routine financial transactions including AP, AR, payroll, tax processing, and general accounting operations.

name: Financial Analysis & Treasury
description: Analysts and specialists performing financial analysis, budgeting, treasury operations, and strategic financial planning.

name: Plant Maintenance Technical Staff
description: Technicians performing hands-on equipment maintenance, repairs, and field service activities.

name: Plant Maintenance Planning & Coordination
description: Planners and coordinators responsible for scheduling maintenance activities and analyzing equipment performance.

name: Equipment Maintenance & Systems Administration
description: Specialists with elevated access for equipment analysis, system administration, and maintenance management.

name: Supply Chain Operations
description: Coordinators and operators handling logistics, distribution, and day-to-day supply chain activities.

name: Supply Chain Planning & Operations Management
description: Managers and planners with elevated access for supply chain strategy, demand planning, and operations oversight.

name: Procurement Operations
description: Analysts and specialists handling sourcing, purchasing, and procurement process activities.

name: Procurement & Supplier Management
description: Managers and specialists with elevated access for vendor relationships, contract management, and strategic sourcing.

name: Product Development & Design
description: Designers, developers, and researchers creating and improving products across the development lifecycle.

name: Product Management & Analysis
description: Product managers and analysts with elevated access for product strategy, roadmap management, and cross-functional coordination.

name: Quality Assurance
description: QA analysts and testers ensuring products and systems meet quality standards and specifications.

name: Warehouse Operations
description: Personnel handling physical inventory management, order fulfillment, and warehouse logistics.

name: Facilities Management & Operations
description: Staff managing and maintaining physical facilities, building systems, and workplace infrastructure.

name: Market Research & Analysis
description: Analysts conducting market research, competitive intelligence, and consumer trend analysis.

name: Research & Development
description: Engineers and scientists performing research and development of new products and technologies.
